section.title: Journey Timeline
section.description: A structured briefing of Gautam's engineering path, active learning signals, shipped foundations, and future roadmap.

categories.label: AI
categories.description: Artificial intelligence learning, experiments, and applied systems.

categories.label: Development
categories.description: Software engineering practice across frontend, backend, and architecture.

categories.label: Projects
categories.description: Portfolio builds and product-oriented implementation milestones.

categories.label: Future
categories.description: Planned roadmap signals and next capability layers.

milestones.title: Engineering Foundation
milestones.summary: Established the React, TypeScript, Vite, linting, and project structure required for a production-oriented portfolio system.
milestones.details: This milestone created the base architecture for scalable frontend work: strict TypeScript, modular source folders, reusable loaders, and validation scripts that keep later phases grounded.

milestones.title: Dynamic Data Layer
milestones.summary: Moved portfolio content into structured data files with typed loader APIs.
milestones.details: The data layer keeps UI components presentation-focused and prepares the portfolio for future CMS, Firebase, or API-backed content without forcing a component rewrite.

milestones.title: AI Command Center Design System
milestones.summary: Created the visual foundation for a premium AI operating-system style portfolio.
milestones.details: The design system introduced reusable components, tokenized surfaces, electric cyan accents, glass panels, responsive layout primitives, and motion foundations.

milestones.title: AI Intro Experience
milestones.summary: Built an initialization sequence that makes the portfolio feel like an AI assistant coming online.
milestones.details: The boot sequence, hero reveal, and AI Orb establish the visitor journey as a guided intelligent system rather than a static landing page.

milestones.title: About Identity System
milestones.summary: Replaced the About placeholder with a dynamic AI briefing about Gautam's focus, mission, and strengths.
milestones.details: This phase turned the identity section into a data-driven command-center briefing that communicates who Gautam is, what he builds, and why he builds.

milestones.title: AI Learning Loop
milestones.summary: Actively deepening practical AI engineering through assistant workflows, prompt systems, and applied product use cases.
milestones.details: The focus is on understanding how intelligent interfaces can help users think, build, and navigate complexity without adding unnecessary noise.

milestones.title: Full Stack Engineering Practice
milestones.summary: Continuing to strengthen frontend systems, backend structure, data flow, and maintainable application architecture.
milestones.details: This milestone represents the ongoing discipline behind the portfolio: building systems that remain understandable as features become more ambitious.

milestones.title: Engineering Education Foundation
milestones.summary: Building technical fundamentals through structured learning, software practice, and continuous experimentation.
milestones.details: The education layer supports the broader engineering path: learning the fundamentals, applying them in projects, and refining judgment through iteration.

milestones.title: Neural Skills Graph
milestones.summary: Planned skills experience that will map Gautam's technical capabilities as connected engineering signals.
milestones.details: The next capability layer will move beyond flat skills lists and show relationships between tools, systems, strengths, and project evidence.

milestones.title: Project Intelligence Layer
milestones.summary: Planned project system for presenting selected builds with richer context, decisions, architecture, and outcomes.
milestones.details: This future phase will help visitors inspect how Gautam thinks through problems, not just what was built.
